all_checks.name: Composite signal vs trend direction
all_checks.detail: Strong composite signal should not oppose strong trend

all_checks.name: MACD crossover vs histogram
all_checks.detail: Histogram sign should match crossover type

all_checks.name: RSI vs Stochastic alignment
all_checks.detail: RSI and Stochastic should not have opposing extremes

all_checks.name: Bollinger %B vs RSI
all_checks.detail: BB position and RSI should not be opposing extremes

all_checks.name: Trend vs MA
all_checks.detail: No MA data

all_checks.name: Supports < price < resistances
all_checks.detail: S/R levels should be properly ordered around price

all_checks.name: Murphy vs standalone nearest support
all_checks.detail: Both tools should identify similar support levels

all_checks.name: S/R levels have adequate spacing
all_checks.detail: S/R levels too close together are essentially duplicates

all_checks.name: Murphy RSI vs standalone RSI
all_checks.detail: Same RSI calculation should produce identical results

all_checks.name: Breakout vs trend
all_checks.detail: No breakout is consistent with any trend

all_checks.name: Breakout nearest_res matches S/R
all_checks.detail: Both tools should find same nearest resistance

all_checks.name: Snapshot RSI vs standalone RSI
all_checks.detail: Snapshot embeds same RSI calculation

all_checks.name: Long stop below entry
all_checks.detail: Long position stop-loss must be below entry

all_checks.name: Swing stop near S/R support
all_checks.detail: Swing stop should relate to nearby support level

all_checks.name: Position sizing capital_at_risk
all_checks.detail: capital_at_risk = |entry - stop|
